cards.title: BP & Lipid Management
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Hypertension: DASH diet, CoQ10 200mg, Mg glycinate, garlic
  • Dyslipidaemia: Omega-3, red yeast rice (with CoQ10), berberine
  • Naturopathic BP targets: <130/80
  • Secondary hypertension red flags

cards.title: Arrhythmia & Heart Rate
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Palpitations: Mg, taurine, hawthorn
  • AF: Risk stratification, CHA2DS2-VASc
  • Sinus bradycardia vs heart block differentiation
  • Vagal manoeuvres: Valsalva, carotid sinus massage

cards.title: CAD & Cardiac Rehab
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • CVD risk calculators: Framingham, QRISK
  • Secondary prevention: Mediterranean diet, omega-3, CoQ10
  • Exercise-based cardiac rehab protocol
  • Stress-heart connection: Mindfulness intervention
